amendments.source_quote: architecture-constraints.md: 'Datastore: SQLite (embedded, single-file; no external database server)' — cannot satisfy 'two or more stateless instances behind a load balancer ... share one datastore'

architecture-constraints.md / Constitution item 4: 'EU region only (data residency)' — upstream pivot: the user added US-based teams, relaxing data residency to per-region (EU + US). The JTBD is unchanged; the spine regenerates from the charter, it does not shatter.
